question: What was the total revenue from EU customers in 2025? Exclude refunded and cancelled orders. Return a single number.
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(o.total_amount),2) FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id=c.id WHERE c.region='EU' AND o.ordered_at BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31' AND o.status NOT IN ('refunded','cancelled');

question: Who were the top 3 customers by revenue in 2025? Exclude refunded and cancelled orders. Return name and revenue, highest first; if two customers tie on revenue, order them by name.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, ROUND(SUM(o.total_amount),2) AS rev FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id=c.id WHERE o.ordered_at BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31' AND o.status NOT IN ('refunded','cancelled') GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY rev DESC, c.name LIMIT 3;

question: Break the monthly recurring revenue of active subscriptions down by plan as of 2025. Return plan and total MRR.
gold_sql: SELECT plan, ROUND(SUM(mrr),2) AS mrr FROM subscriptions WHERE canceled_at IS NULL GROUP BY plan ORDER BY mrr DESC, plan;
